channel.title: Chus Antonanzas Blog
channel.description: Technical writing by Chus Antonanzas on machine learning, inference, and systems.

item.title: State Space Models (3): Mamba and Mamba-2
item.description: Learn all about the Mamba and Mamba-2 models in the third part of the State Space Model series.

item.title: State Space Models (2): networks and S4
item.description: Learn about SSM (State Space Model) neural networks, like Mamba, and the advances that made them possible.

item.title: State Space Models (1): introduction to SSMs
item.description: Explore State Space Models (SSMs) in this introductory post. Learn about their history, how they work and their current role in machine learning with interactive visualizations.
